PAN Card (Physical)
Application Submit Ho Gayi!
🎉 Aapka PAN Card Slip 5 se 30 minute mein mil jayega.
📂 Slip download karne ke liye UTI PAN section mein jaayein → All Apply mein jaayein → jis application ka slip download karna hai uske neeche "Slip Download" button dikhega, uspe click karke download kar lijiyega.
Acknowledgement Number
⚠️ Yeh number save kar lijiye — status track karne ke liye kaam aayega.

UTI E-PAN Download

UTI E-PAN Download Karen

E-PAN kya hota hai?
E-PAN ek digital PDF version hai PAN card ka. Ye valid document hai aur original PAN card ki tarah kaam karta hai. UTI se download karne par seedha aapke phone/PC mein aayega.
Download Fee
₹8.26 + GST
UTI Hold PAN — Verification
Ye applications hold mein hain — additional documents ya verification zaruri hai. View karke document upload karen.

Home/NSDL eKYC PAN Service
Easy Pan Service
Sabse aasan tarika — sirf Aadhar se PAN banaye. Koi document nahi chahiye. Turant process hoga.

Easy Pan Service

Easy Pan ke Fayde
Koi document scan nahi karna
Sirf Aadhar OTP se verify
10 minute mein apply complete
PAN 3-7 din mein milega
Digital + Physical dono milenge
Charge / Fee
₹107 per application
Commission aapko milega alag se
New Pan Card Apply
Jis vyakti ke paas abhi tak PAN card nahi hai, unke liye naya PAN card apply karen.

New Pan Card Apply

Zaroori Documents
Aadhar Card (ID + Address proof)
Date of Birth proof (School certificate ya Aadhar)
Passport size photo (2)
Signature
Charge / Fee
₹107 per application
PAN card 7-15 working days mein milega
Tip
Agar sirf Aadhar se apply karna hai aur documents nahi hain toh Easy Pan Service use karen — zyada aasan hai!
Pan Card Correction / Change
PAN card mein naam, date of birth, address ya koi bhi galti ko sahi karen.

Pan Card Correction / Change

Correction ke liye Documents
Existing PAN Card copy
Aadhar Card (address + ID proof)
Naam change ke liye — Gazette / Marriage certificate
DOB change ke liye — Birth certificate
Passport size photo (2)
Correction Fee
₹107 per application
Updated PAN card 7-15 working days mein aayega
Correction Types
Naam change / spelling sahi karna
Date of birth correct karna
Photo ya signature badalna
Khoya hua PAN reprint

Check Aadhar PAN Link Status — ₹10
You Can Check Aadhar Pan Link Status

Kya hota hai is service se?
Aadhar aur PAN ka link verify kiya jaata hai. Agar link nahi hai to Income Tax returns reject ho sakte hain. Link status pata karne ke baad aap linking ke liye apply kar sakte hain.

Notice

Application Submit Ho Gayi!
🎉 Aapka PAN Card Slip 5 se 30 minute mein mil jayega.
📂 Slip download karne ke liye PAN Card section mein jaayein → All Apply mein jaayein → jis application ka slip download karna hai uske neeche "Slip Download" button dikhega, uspe click karke download kar lijiyega.
🪪
KYC Verification Required
Admin ne aapko KYC complete karne ko kaha hai
KYC kyun zaroori hai?
Apni identity verify karne ke liye government-issued document submit karna hoga. Iske bina kuch services limited ho sakti hain.
